mapper.insert: INSERT INTO risk_punishment( punish_id, user_id, type, status, start_time, end_time, reason_code, decision_id, operator_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{punishId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reasonCode}, #{decisionId}, #{operatorId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT IGNORE INTO risk_punishment( punish_id, user_id, type, status, start_time, end_time, reason_code, decision_id, operator_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{punishId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reasonCode}, #{decisionId}, #{operatorId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_punishment SET status = 'REVOKED', operator_id = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE punish_id = #{punishId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
